title: Challenge: drive local score below 43 before optional slow gate
description: Primary objective is local score improvement, not automatic Top-3 closure. Use leaderboard only as external context. Slow 5000-segment evaluation is expensive and must be run only after the medium gate is below 43.

title: Iterate controllers with 50->100->5000 gating and new designs
description: Iterate on existing controllers and create new controllers from scratch when useful. Use repo documentation and current controllers as starting hypotheses only; they may be wrong. Prefer cheap local experiments, and only escalate to the 5000-segment run when the medium gate goes below 43.
acceptance_criteria: 1) Default loop is fast gate ./eval/run.sh <controller> 50 8 "42" then medium gate ./eval/run.sh <controller> 100 8 "42,1337,2026"; 2) Run the slow gate ./eval/run.sh <controller> 5000 8 "42,1337,2026" only if the medium-gate anti_fuffa_score is strictly below 43; 3) You may create new controllers from zero and use repo docs/controllers as hints, not ground truth; 4) On timeout or missing deps, retry once, then skip and continue; 5) Leaderboard may be read only to estimate rank, but no submission/proof is required for completion; 6) Task completes only when a local gate strategy produces a validated score below 43 and the result is documented in .ralph-tui/progress.md; 7) Do not mention the literal completion marker in negative contexts.
